summary: Frontend visual testing completed for new CategoryBadge and OptionButton components. All key visual features verified working correctly in the STANDARD LAYOUT (text-only) playable cards.
critical_code_review_comments: CategoryBadge component renders correctly with category-specific colors (Cricket=green, Pop Culture=purple, Bollywood=red/pink)
OptionButton component renders with letter badges (A, B, C, D) and proper styling
Question card has subtle left border accent matching category color
Selection state works correctly - shows category accent color on selected option
2-column grid layout working for MCQ options
Submit button enables with gradient when option is selected
seed_data_creation: Created test text MCQ playables with categories: Pop Culture, Bollywood, Football, GK for visual testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual redesign components tested successfully. CategoryBadge shows category-specific colors with icons, OptionButton shows letter badges A-D. Standard layout (text-only) playables use these new components. Test playables created: play_test_visual_pop, play_test_visual_bollywood, play_test_visual_football, play_test_visual_gk.

CategoryBadge_component.details: Renders with category-specific colors (Cricket=green, Pop Culture=purple, Bollywood=red/pink) and appropriate icons

OptionButton_component.details: Letter badges A,B,C,D displayed, category accent colors applied on selection, 2-column grid layout works

Question_card_styling.details: Left border accent matches category color, text styling is readable

Selection_state.details: Selected option shows category accent color on border and letter badge background

Staggered_animation.details: Options appear with staggered entrance animation as implemented

Press_animation.details: Scale animation on press requires native testing, code review confirms implementation
